## 1. Color Specification

**Primary hue: 22° (terracotta/burnt orange)**

Rationale: Sidesteps the amber–golden band (38–70°) and cool slate runs (210–215°) from the past week. At 22°, the hue lands in terracotta/rust territory — the brief's "burnt orange, deep yellow, or warm rust" resolves cleanest here, erring toward rust over amber.
